relevant_files.rationale: Core state management controller with BFS-based update propagation, state lifecycle management, and inspector integration. Main optimization target for performance and architecture improvements.

key_code.description: Main controller component managing state enumeration, state transitions via selectedIndex setter, and hierarchical state updates using BFS traversal
Core notification mechanism using BFS queue-based traversal to propagate state changes to all child StateSelect components
State transition entry point with boundary validation, previous state tracking, and change detection flag

relevant_files.topic_relation: State management optimization directly targets this file's BFS traversal algorithm, state transition logic, and inspector refresh mechanisms

relevant_files.rationale: Property binding component with complex data structure (TCtrl/TPage/TProp) managing state-to-property mappings. Critical for data model optimization and UI responsiveness.

key_code.description: Property binding component with controller mapping, property data storage, and change propagation logic
Nested data structure storing state-property mappings with metadata fields ($$lastProp$$, $$changedProp$$, $$controlledProps$$)
Handles incoming state changes from controller, updates property values, and refreshes UI

relevant_files.topic_relation: Data model optimization focuses on simplifying TCtrl/TPage/TProp structure and improving property change detection efficiency

relevant_files.rationale: Property handler registry pattern with 40+ registered handlers for different component types. Extension point for new property types with clean interface design.

key_code.description: Clean interface defining getValue/setValue/getDefaultValue contract for property handlers
Centralized registry using Map<EnumPropName, IPropHandler> with O(1) lookup performance
40+ property handler registrations covering node properties, components, and widget attributes

relevant_files.topic_relation: Handler pattern serves as architectural reference for extensibility and separation of concerns in state management

relevant_files.rationale: Centralized error handling with configurable log levels, graceful fallback mechanism, and validation utilities. Provides debugging support and runtime safety.

key_code.description: Unified error handling with ErrorLevel enum, context-aware logging, and gracefulFallback<T> for safe error recovery
Safe execution wrapper catching exceptions and returning fallback values to prevent crashes

relevant_files.topic_relation: Error management integration point for robust state transitions and debugging support during optimization

relevant_files.rationale: Node property group (Active, Position, Scale, Color, Size, Euler, Anchor, Opacity) with getter/setter delegating to StateSelect. Inspector UI integration.

key_code.description: 8 node property checkboxes with visibility control via isPropertyControlled() and togglePropertyControl()

relevant_files.topic_relation: Inspector UI binding pattern for node properties, potential optimization target for reducing getter/setter overhead

relevant_files.rationale: Component property group (Label, Sprite, Button, Toggle, etc.) with 18 property checkboxes using same delegation pattern as StateNodeProps.

key_code.description: 18 component property checkboxes with conditional visibility based on component availability

relevant_files.topic_relation: Extension of property binding pattern to component-specific properties, follows same delegation architecture

relevant_files.rationale: Widget property group for layout constraints (Top, Bottom, Left, Right, alignment modes). Part of inspector property organization.

key_code.description: 14 widget-related property checkboxes following same delegation pattern

relevant_files.topic_relation: Widget-specific property bindings completing the inspector property hierarchy

relevant_files.rationale: Enum definitions for EnumStateName (dynamic), EnumUpdataType (7 types), EnumCtrlName (dynamic), EnumPropName (property types). Dynamic enum generation.

key_code.description: 7 update types: Name, SelPage, State, Delete, Init, Prop, Move - defines state change notification types

relevant_files.topic_relation: Type system foundation for state management communication protocol

relevant_files.rationale: Demo usage showing StateController reference and manual state switching via selectedIndex. Simple integration example.

key_code.description: Example of manual state switching: toggles between state 0 and 1

relevant_files.topic_relation: Usage example demonstrating external API for state transitions

relevant_files.rationale: Test file from related package showing DFS traversal, node matching, and auto-mounting patterns. Different architecture but useful testing patterns.

key_code.description: Test utility for building node hierarchies - useful pattern for state controller testing

relevant_files.topic_relation: Testing patterns for node traversal and property mounting that could inform state controller testing strategy

existing_patterns: BFS queue-based traversal for state propagation (StateController.updateState)
Handler registry pattern with IPropHandler interface (PropHandlerManager)
Property group classes delegating to owner component (StateNodeProps/StateComponentProps/StateWidgetProps)
Nested data structure with metadata fields ($$lastProp$$, $$changedProp$$, $$controlledProps$$)
Graceful fallback with try-catch and safe return values (StateErrorManager.gracefulFallback)
architecture_constraints: Cocos Creator 2.4.13 engine with cc.Component base class
Editor-only execution via CC_EDITOR flag and executeInEditMode decorator
Property system requires cc._decorator integration (@property decorator)
Serialization via _ctrlData property with complex nested structure
Dynamic enum updates require cc.Class.Attr.setClassAttr manipulation
Node validation via isValid property to prevent null reference errors
Parent-child hierarchy assumptions for controller-select relationship
Inspector refresh via Editor.Utils.refreshInspector() with setTimeout workaround
TypeScript with cc._decorator metadata system for property exposure
integration_points: StateController → StateSelect: updateState() notification with EnumUpdataType
StateSelect → PropHandlerManager: getValue/setValue for property manipulation
StateSelect → Parent Node: updateCtrlName() on parent change
StateController → Enum System: Dynamic enum updates via cc.Class.Attr
StateErrorManager → Console: Conditional logging based on ErrorLevel
inspiration_sources: Property mounter two-phase pattern (Phase 1: direct mount, Phase 2: pending mounts)
DFS vs BFS traversal comparison for state propagation
Handler registry pattern enabling 40+ property types with clean extension
Graceful fallback pattern preventing crashes in edge cases
Visited Set pattern preventing duplicate node processing
Dynamic enum generation for runtime state definition
Log level configuration for debugging control

key_findings: BFS traversal in StateController.updateState() is core performance bottleneck
TCtrl/TPage/TProp data structure has 3 layers of nesting with redundant metadata
Handler registry pattern successfully supports 40+ property types
Inspector refresh uses setTimeout workaround indicating Editor API limitations
Property groups (Node/Component/Widget) follow consistent delegation pattern
